headlines.title: Learn about the latest advances in physical AI at the Robotics Summit
headlines.summary: The Robotics Summit & Expo will have an entire track of sessions focusing on how to apply artificial intelligence to robotics.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle robot, robotics ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: ABB Robotics launches PoWa cobot family targeting industrial tasks
headlines.summary: ABB Robotics said its new PoWa family of cobots addresses a long‑standing gap in the market between traditional cobots.

headlines.title: Look back on 10 years of legged robots with Ghost Robotics at the Robotics Summit
headlines.summary: At the summit, Gavin Kenneally, CEO and co-founder of Ghost Robotics, will share lessons from 10 years of deploying quadruped robots.

headlines.title: SquareMind raises $18M for robotic dermatology platform
headlines.summary: Squaremind has raised funding to launch Swan, a robotic platform that automates full-body skin imaging for early cancer detection.

political_items.title: Suspect charged with attempted assassination of Trump at Washington dinner
political_items.summary: Investigators say the 31-year-old California man wanted to kill as many high-level officials as possible.
political_items.summary_tr: Bu haber, makro ve jeopolitik tarafta piyasalari etkileyebilecek yeni bir kirilmaya isaret ediyor.

political_items.title: Jimmy Kimmel rejects White House criticism over Melania widow joke
political_items.summary: In a parody aired days before the White House Correspondents' Dinner, Kimmel called Melania an "expectant widow".

political_items.title: Russian superyacht sails through Strait of Hormuz despite blockade
political_items.summary: The 141m-long vessel, linked to a close ally of Russian President Vladimir Putin, cleared the waterway despite an ongoing blockade.
